description: LocoNet driver OTLP metrics from dcc-bus: bus utilization (% of 16.66 kbit/s capacity), estimated max slot capacity (linear extrapolation from BigFred TX), throughput (RX/TX), per-opcode traffic, TX pacer saturation, slot lifecycle, transport reliability, and internal queue backpressure. Requires a LocoNet command station with telemetry enabled.

panels.description: LocoNet frames transmitted per second (all opcodes). Theoretical bus ceiling is ~280 frames/s at 16.66 kbit/s.
panels.title: TX frames / s

panels.description: LocoNet frames received per second (checksum-valid, after transport parsing).
panels.title: RX frames / s

panels.description: LocoNet slots currently owned by this dcc-bus daemon (hub mode).
panels.title: Active slots

panels.description: Seconds per second spent blocked in the TX pacer waiting for the minimum inter-frame gap. Rising values mean the driver is outpacing the 16.66 kbit/s bus.
panels.title: Pacer saturation

panels.description: Speed frames dropped because a newer SetSpeed superseded them while waiting for the bus (TX coalescing).
panels.title: Coalesced / s

panels.description: Share of slot acquisitions that failed after retries.
panels.title: Slot acquire fail %

panels.description: Share of the 16.66 kbit/s serial ceiling (~2083 B/s) used by frames transmitted by BigFred.
panels.title: BigFred TX (bytes)

panels.description: Share of the practical LocoNet frame ceiling (~280 frames/s) used by BigFred transmissions.
panels.title: BigFred TX (frames)

panels.description: Total bus traffic observed on RX (all participants: command station, physical throttles, BigFred echoes) as % of ~2083 B/s.
panels.title: Bus load (bytes)

panels.description: Total frames observed on RX as % of the ~280 frames/s practical ceiling.
panels.title: Bus load (frames)

panels.description: Linear extrapolation: active slots divided by BigFred TX byte utilization (2083 B/s ceiling). If each slot keeps its current average TX load, this is how many slots the bus could carry before saturation. When no WebSocket sessions are connected, the slot count is floored at 1 so idle daemons still show a theoretical capacity (TX utilization is floored at 1%). Ignores traffic from other LocoNet devices.

targets.expr: (sum(bigfred_dcc_bus_loconet_slots_active{service_name="dcc-bus", layout_id=~"$layout_id", command_station_id=~"$command_station_id", station_kind=~"$station_kind"}) + (sum(bigfred_dcc_bus_ws_sessions_active{service_name="dcc-bus", layout_id=~"$layout_id", command_station_id=~"$command_station_id"}) == bool 0) * (sum(bigfred_dcc_bus_loconet_slots_active{service_name="dcc-bus", layout_id=~"$layout_id", command_station_id=~"$command_station_id", station_kind=~"$station_kind"}) == bool 0)) / clamp_min(sum(rate(bigfred_dcc_bus_loconet_bytes_total{service_name="dcc-bus", layout_id=~"$layout_id", command_station_id=~"$command_station_id", station_kind=~"$station_kind", direction="tx"}[$__rate_interval])) / 2083, 0.01)

panels.title: Est. max slots

panels.description: LocoNet frame rate by direction.
panels.title: Frames / s by direction

panels.description: LocoNet byte rate by direction. Theoretical serial ceiling is ~2083 B/s at 16.66 kbit/s.
panels.title: Bytes / s by direction

panels.description: LocoNet bus capacity by byte rate. Ceiling: 16.66 kbit/s ≈ 2083 B/s. Green <50%, yellow 50–75%, orange 75–90%, red >90%.
panels.title: Byte utilization %

panels.description: LocoNet bus capacity by frame rate. Practical ceiling: ~280 frames/s (avg short frame + CD backoff). Same threshold bands as byte panel.
panels.title: Frame utilization %

panels.description: Transmitted LocoNet messages per second, broken down by opcode label.

targets.expr: topk(12, sum(rate(bigfred_dcc_bus_loconet_messages_total{service_name="dcc-bus", direction="tx", layout_id=~"$layout_id", command_station_id=~"$command_station_id", station_kind=~"$station_kind", opcode=~"$opcode"}[$__rate_interval])) by (opcode))

panels.title: TX messages / s by opcode

panels.description: Received LocoNet messages per second, broken down by opcode label.

targets.expr: topk(12, sum(rate(bigfred_dcc_bus_loconet_messages_total{service_name="dcc-bus", direction="rx", layout_id=~"$layout_id", command_station_id=~"$command_station_id", station_kind=~"$station_kind", opcode=~"$opcode"}[$__rate_interval])) by (opcode))

panels.title: RX messages / s by opcode

panels.description: Current TX/RX message rates per opcode (table view).
panels.title: Message rates by opcode (instant)

panels.description: Rate of time spent blocked in the TX pacer. Approaching 1.0 means the driver is fully paced by the bus.
panels.title: Pacer saturation over time

panels.description: Speed frames coalesced (dropped as stale) per second.
panels.title: Coalesced frames / s

panels.description: Internal channel occupancy (rxCh, obsCh, syncCh). Rising values warn of backpressure before drops.
panels.title: Queue depth

panels.description: Events dropped because an internal channel was full (obsCh for state observations, syncCh for request/response replies).
panels.title: Dropped events / s by queue

panels.description: Transport and protocol errors per second, by kind.
panels.title: Errors / s by kind

panels.description: Cumulative error counters since process start (useful after reconnect storms).
panels.title: Errors in range (total)

panels.description: Number of LocoNet slots owned by BigFred over time.
panels.title: Active slots over time

panels.description: Slot lifecycle events: acquire, release, dispatch, keepalive refresh, retries, failures.
panels.title: Slot operations / s

title: BigFred / dcc-bus / LocoNet
